eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Idaho; Lincoln, MT; Malheur, OR; at 08:23 PM ON MAR 9, 2026 Effective until 10:23 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an activation of the amber alert system. This is the Idaho State Communications Center. We have just received this important information regarding a child abducted, taken from Jerome, Idaho. ISP is looking for a child who is believed to be in danger. The child's name is Delia. She is a 15 year old, female with black hair, brown eyes, and was last seen wearing dark grey sweater, blue jeans, grey Jordan shoes. Authorities say that the child may be in the company of Francisco Vargas Pegueros, Age 23, and they may be traveling in a Black 2007 GMC Yukon TX Plate T Z K 7 7 7 6 that is traveling through Utah, possibly in Colorado. If you have any information on the whereabouts of this child, please contact 911 immediately.
